title: Casework | Zarah Sultana MP
text_excerpt: Casework | Zarah Sultana MP About Casework Cost of Living Get in touch Volunteer Donate Casework If you need help with any issues ranging from immigration and housing, to benefits and unemployment, please do not hesitate to contact me. I receive hundreds of emails a month from constituents and my casework team and I will do everything we can to advocate for Coventry South constituents, no matter the case at hand. Below are a series of links and contact details for various organisations across the city, and online resources which may be able to help you or answer any questions you have. To raise casework with me, please email coventrysouth@parliament.uk including your address, details of your case and any further information or reference numbers that may be relevant to your case. Please be aware that I can only take on the cases of constituents of mine in Coventry South and that as an MP’s office we do not hold statutory powers. Legal Aid The Coventry Law Centre can be reached at 02476 223053 and enquiries@centralenglandlc.org.uk Community Support You can request support from Coventry Foodbank here and from the Council’s Emergency Food Network here and at 08085 834 333 . Age UK Community Support can be reached at info@ageukcovwarks.org.uk or 02476 231 999 . MENTAL HEALTH Get advice from Mental Health Matters here and at 0800 616 171 . Contact Samaritans 24/7 at 116 123 and here , or from Coventry Samaritans at 024 7667 8678 and here . Access the NHS Mental Health Crisis Service here and at 0300 200 0011 . RAPE AND SEXUAL ASSAULT For support with sexual violence and abuse regardless of age or gender identity, and whether it is recent, historic or ongoing, contact Coventry Rape and Sexual Assault Centre here . Council queries Raise issues regarding Council services at customer.services@coventry.gov.uk or 08085 834333 , report missed bin collection here , or get support from your local councillor here . PARLIAMENT RESOURCES If you’d like to browse the House of Commons Library for information regarding your case, please click here . MIGRANT SUPPORT The Coventry Refugee and Migrant Centre can be reached at adviceteam@covrefugee.org and 02476 227 254 . CARAG can be found here . Carriers of Hope can be reached at 07429415489 . HOME OFFICE If you need support with an existing Home Office application, please email me with your full name, address, date of birth, nationality and a reference number. RIGHTS AT WORK You can find information regarding your rights at work from Trades Union Congress here , Citizens Advice here , from Acas here and from the government here . The Coventry Law Centre also has an employment advice helpline available on 02476 252 687 . Benefits Read about and apply for benefits here . Calculate your benefit entitlement with entitledto or turn2us. Get help applying for Universal Credit from Citizens Advice here . HOUSING Find housing advice from Shelter here and from P3 here . Rough sleeping support from the Council can be found here . Further information is provided Citizens Advice here . COVENTRY WOMEN'S PARTNERSHIP (FWT) FWT provide a place for all women to access education, training, healthcare and employment opportunities. They can be found here and reached at 02476637693 or office@fwt.org.uk . FURTHER ADVICE Citizens Advice service can be found here . The Money Advice Service can be found here . Consumer rights information can be found here . SUPPORT FROM THE COUNCIL Contact the Council’s Benefits team for advice and support at benefits@coventry.gov.uk , by calling 024 7683 1800, or visiting the Housing Benefit and Council Tax Support page . Promoted by Vivien Kaliczak on behalf of Zarah Sultana, both at Unite the Union, 90 Short Street, Coventry, CV1 2LW. Useful links VOLUNTEER DONATE Contact Privacy Policy Cookies Policy Donation Policy Join Team Zarah We don’t have billionaire donors or press baron friends. That’s why we need you. Wherever you live, join our team to fight for a brighter future. Sign up This
